title: Expert Copywriter
prompt: Act as an expert copywriter with 20 years experience in direct response marketing. Write a sales page for [product] that targets [audience]. Use the PAS framework (Problem-Agitate-Solution).
creator: PromptHub

title: Code Review Expert
prompt: Review the following code for bugs, performance issues, and security vulnerabilities. Provide specific fixes with explanations for each issue found.
creator: PromptHub

title: SEO Blog Writer
prompt: Write a comprehensive SEO-optimized blog post about [topic]. Include H2 and H3 headings with keywords, bullet points, a comparison table, and a conclusion with a CTA.
creator: PromptHub

title: Job Interview Coach
prompt: Act as a senior interview coach. Prepare me for a [role] interview at [company]. Generate 10 likely questions with model answers using the STAR method.
creator: PromptHub

title: Business Strategist
prompt: Act as a business consultant. Analyze [business idea] and provide a SWOT analysis, competitive landscape overview, and 3 actionable strategic recommendations.
creator: PromptHub

title: SQL Expert
prompt: Write an optimized SQL query for [scenario]. Include proper indexing strategy, explain the execution plan, and suggest alternative approaches.
creator: PromptHub

title: Resume Writer
prompt: Act as a professional resume writer. Rewrite these experience bullet points to be more impactful, quantifiable, and ATS-friendly.
creator: PromptHub

title: Social Media Manager
prompt: Create a 30-day social media content calendar for [brand/niche] across Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn. Mix educational, entertaining, and promotional content.
